title: TOBACCO CESSATION - 211info
text: KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TOBACCO CESSATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide referrals to tobacco cessation resources including classes and nicotine replacement 3314 Vandenberg Road Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 882-8846 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-8846 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Comprehensive Information and Referral * Smoking/Nicotine Addiction Issues Smoking/Vaping Cessation * Smoking/Nicotine Addiction Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
